title: Firefox
excerpt: Version 153.0beta, first offered to Beta channel users on June 17, 2026
content_html:
Version 153.0beta, first offered to Beta channel users on June 17, 2026

Firefox Beta gets updated 3 times a week and as a consequence, the release notes for the Beta channel are updated continuously to reflect features that have reached sufficient maturity to benefit from community feedback and bug reports.

Warning: Features listed here may or may not make a final release of Firefox.

In addition to these release notes, you can follow ongoing development via the Firefox Trains website or our @FirefoxBeta Bluesky account.

  • High Dynamic Range (HDR) video playback is now available on Windows - this feature needs HDR mode enabled for the display in Windows Settings - Display. Laptop displays that only offer "HDR video streaming" are not supported at this time. Some videos recorded on phones in certain orientations are currently not shown as HDR.

  • Containers let you keep separate parts of your online life (work, shopping, personal, banking) logged into different accounts in the same browser window, but keep your cookies and ad tracking isolated inside each container.

  • It is now possible to merge multiple PDFs by dragging a PDF into the PDF sidebar.

  • It is now possible to add images as new pages within PDFs using the Firefox PDF editor.

  • Quickly pick and copy a color from any page by typing "pick color", "color picker", or "eyedropper" in the address bar and selecting the "Pick a color" quick action.

  • Added support for Apple's system-wide full-screen keyboard command (Globe-F).

  • Share any open page with a QR code. Right-click a tab, select Share > Generate QR Code. Great for posters, invitations, banners, and other printed materials. On macOS, you can also right-click the address bar to access the Share menu.

  • Firefox now verifies and displays Qualified Website Authentication Certificates (QWACs) in accordance with eIDAS regulations.

  • Added improved support for videos with overlays so users can more easily access video actions from context menus.

  • Firefox now highlights the location permission icon in red whenever a website has access to your location. The permission icon is also now visible on search results pages where it was previously hidden.

  • Firefox Labs can now be opened quickly by typing "labs" or "experiment" in the address bar and selecting the Open Firefox Labs quick action.

  • Firefox now offers experimental support for the new JPEG XL image format, which generally provides better compression than WebP, JPEG, PNG, and GIF and is designed to supersede them. You can enable it from the Firefox Labs panel in Settings.

  • Extensions can no longer access local files by default. Users can grant or revoke this access via the new "Access local files on your computer" permission, separate from "Access your data for all websites".

  • Local Network Access restrictions are now enabled by default for all users. Firefox requires websites to request permission before connecting to devices on your local network or to apps and services on your device.

  • Outdated cookie settings have been removed from the Settings UI. Users still in that mode should switch to default behavior "Isolate cross-site cookies". More information

  • A new "Local Mode" setting in the options panel allows developers to load local directories via custom origins. This simplifies testing for APIs that do not function over standard file:// URLs, removing the need to run a local web server. Multiple directory mappings are supported.

  • Firefox now supports a limited subset of the non-standard ::-webkit-scrollbar pseudo-element to improve web compatibility:

    • Rules with non-zero width/height disable overlay scrollbars for the affected container.
    • display: none on ::-webkit-scrollbar behaves like scrollbar-width: none, hiding the scrollbar.
    • @supports selector(::-webkit-scrollbar) now evaluates to true.
    • Full styling capabilities (colors, border-radius, etc.) are intentionally not supported.

  • Updated HTML parsing rules for <select> elements, aligning with web standards to support future customizable select dropdown features.

  • The vertical-align property was converted into a shorthand for baseline-source, alignment-baseline, and baseline-shift in Firefox 149. Now, alignment-baseline supports the new keywords alphabetic, ideographic, central, mathematical, and hanging, extending the variety of baselines to choose for alignment.

  • Implemented the new popover=hint spec, which removes a series of inconsistent and unexpected behaviors.

  • The circle() and ellipse() functions accept two new keywords closest-corner and farthest-corner for their radial size.

  • The newly added Error.stackTraceLimit property allows to set the maximal depth of the captured JavaScript error stack as a performance optimization.

  • Developers can now use the text import attribute to import text files using the module system.

  • The Picture In Picture API exposes a way for web developers to make use of user agent Picture-In-Picture functionality.

  • The Intl.LocaleInfo proposal adds the ability to query Locale information, such as week data (first day in a week, weekend start day, weekend end day), text direction and hour cycle used in the Locale.

  • The MediaCapabilities.decodingInfo() and MediaCapabilities.encodingInfo() methods now accept the "webrtc" configuration type. This allows a site to query whether a given audio or video configuration can be decoded or encoded for WebRTC and whether doing so will be smooth and/or powerEfficient.
content_text: Version 153.0beta, first offered to Beta channel users on June 17, 2026 Firefox Beta gets updated 3 times a week and as a consequence, the release notes for the Beta channel are updated continuously to reflect features that have reached sufficient maturity to benefit from community feedback and bug reports. Warning: Features listed here may or may not make a final release of Firefox. In addition to these release notes, you can follow ongoing development via the Firefox Trains website or our @FirefoxBeta Bluesky account. High Dynamic Range (HDR) video playback is now available on Windows - this feature needs HDR mode enabled for the display in Windows Settings - Display. Laptop displays that only offer "HDR video streaming" are not supported at this time. Some videos recorded on phones in certain orientations are currently not shown as HDR. Containers let you keep separate parts of your online life (work, shopping, personal, banking) logged into different accounts in the same browser window, but keep your cookies and ad tracking isolated inside each container. It is now possible to merge multiple PDFs by dragging a PDF into the PDF sidebar. It is now possible to add images as new pages within PDFs using the Firefox PDF editor. Quickly pick and copy a color from any page by typing "pick color", "color picker", or "eyedropper" in the address bar and selecting the "Pick a color" quick action. Added support for Apple's system-wide full-screen keyboard command (Globe-F). Share any open page with a QR code. Right-click a tab, select Share > Generate QR Code. Great for posters, invitations, banners, and other printed materials. On macOS, you can also right-click the address bar to access the Share menu. Firefox now verifies and displays Qualified Website Authentication Certificates (QWACs) in accordance with eIDAS regulations. Added improved support for videos with overlays so users can more easily access video actions from context menus. Firefox now highlights the location permission icon in red whenever a website has access to your location. The permission icon is also now visible on search results pages where it was previously hidden. Firefox Labs can now be opened quickly by typing "labs" or "experiment" in the address bar and selecting the Open Firefox Labs quick action. Firefox now offers experimental support for the new JPEG XL image format, which generally provides better compression than WebP, JPEG, PNG, and GIF and is designed to supersede them. You can enable it from the Firefox Labs panel in Settings. Extensions can no longer access local files by default. Users can grant or revoke this access via the new "Access local files on your computer" permission, separate from "Access your data for all websites". Local Network Access restrictions are now enabled by default for all users. Firefox requires websites to request permission before connecting to devices on your local network or to apps and services on your device. Outdated cookie settings have been removed from the Settings UI. Users still in that mode should switch to default behavior "Isolate cross-site cookies". More information A new "Local Mode" setting in the options panel allows developers to load local directories via custom origins. This simplifies testing for APIs that do not function over standard file:// URLs, removing the need to run a local web server. Multiple directory mappings are supported. Firefox now supports a limited subset of the non-standard ::-webkit-scrollbar pseudo-element to improve web compatibility: Rules with non-zero width/height disable overlay scrollbars for the affected container. display: none on ::-webkit-scrollbar behaves like scrollbar-width: none, hiding the scrollbar. @supports selector(::-webkit-scrollbar) now evaluates to true. Full styling capabilities (colors, border-radius, etc.) are intentionally not supported. Updated HTML parsing rules for <select> elements, aligning with web standards to support future customizable select dropdown features. The vertical-align property was converted into a shorthand for baseline-source, alignment-baseline, and baseline-shift in Firefox 149. Now, alignment-baseline supports the new keywords alphabetic, ideographic, central, mathematical, and hanging, extending the variety of baselines to choose for alignment. Implemented the new popover=hint spec, which removes a series of inconsistent and unexpected behaviors. The circle() and ellipse() functions accept two new keywords closest-corner and farthest-corner for their radial size. The newly added Error.stackTraceLimit property allows to set the maximal depth of the captured JavaScript error stack as a performance optimization. Developers can now use the text import attribute to import text files using the module system. The Picture In Picture API exposes a way for web developers to make use of user agent Picture-In-Picture functionality. The Intl.LocaleInfo proposal adds the ability to query Locale information, such as week data (first day in a week, weekend start day, weekend end day), text direction and hour cycle used in the Locale. The MediaCapabilities.decodingInfo() and MediaCapabilities.encodingInfo() methods now accept the "webrtc" configuration type. This allows a site to query whether a given audio or video configuration can be decoded or encoded for WebRTC and whether doing so will be smooth and/or powerEfficient.

blocks.html_en: • A new "Local Mode" setting in the options panel allows developers to load local directories via custom origins. This simplifies testing for APIs that do not function over standard file:// URLs, removing the need to run a local web server. Multiple directory mappings are supported.

sentences.en: A new "Local Mode" setting in the options panel allows developers to load local directories via custom origins.
sentences.zh: 选项面板中的新“本地模式”设置允许开发人员通过自定义来源加载本地目录。

sentences.en: This simplifies testing for APIs that do not function over standard file:// URLs, removing the need to run a local web server.
sentences.zh: 这简化了对无法通过标准 file:// URL 运行的 API 的测试，无需运行本地 Web 服务器。

sentences.en: Multiple directory mappings are supported.
sentences.zh: 支持多个目录映射。

blocks.html_en: A new "Local Mode" setting in the options panel allows developers to load local directories via custom origins. This simplifies testing for APIs that do not function over standard file:// URLs, removing the need to run a local web server. Multiple directory mappings are supported.

sentences.en: A new "Local Mode" setting in the options panel allows developers to load local directories via custom origins.
sentences.zh: 选项面板中的新“本地模式”设置允许开发人员通过自定义来源加载本地目录。

sentences.en: This simplifies testing for APIs that do not function over standard file:// URLs, removing the need to run a local web server.
sentences.zh: 这简化了对无法通过标准 file:// URL 运行的 API 的测试，无需运行本地 Web 服务器。

sentences.en: Multiple directory mappings are supported.
sentences.zh: 支持多个目录映射。

blocks.html_en:
• Firefox now supports a limited subset of the non-standard ::-webkit-scrollbar pseudo-element to improve web compatibility:

    • Rules with non-zero width/height disable overlay scrollbars for the affected container.
    • display: none on ::-webkit-scrollbar behaves like scrollbar-width: none, hiding the scrollbar.
    • @supports selector(::-webkit-scrollbar) now evaluates to true.
    • Full styling capabilities (colors, border-radius, etc.) are intentionally not supported.

sentences.en: Firefox now supports a limited subset of the non-standard ::-webkit-scrollbar pseudo-element to improve web compatibility: Rules with non-zero width/height disable overlay scrollbars for the affected container.
sentences.zh: Firefox 现在支持非标准 ::-webkit-scrollbar 伪元素的有限子集，以提高 Web 兼容性：具有非零宽度/高度的规则会禁用受影响容器的覆盖滚动条。

sentences.en: display: none on ::-webkit-scrollbar behaves like scrollbar-width: none, hiding the scrollbar. @supports selector(::-webkit-scrollbar) now evaluates to true.
sentences.zh: ::-webkit-scrollbar 上的 display: none 的行为类似于scrollbar-width: none，隐藏滚动条。 @supports 选择器(::-webkit-scrollbar) 现在评估为 true。

sentences.en: Full styling capabilities (colors, border-radius, etc.) are intentionally not supported.
sentences.zh: 故意不支持完整的样式功能（颜色、边框半径等）。

blocks.html_en: Firefox now supports a limited subset of the non-standard ::-webkit-scrollbar pseudo-element to improve web compatibility:

sentences.en: Firefox now supports a limited subset of the non-standard ::-webkit-scrollbar pseudo-element to improve web compatibility:
sentences.zh: Firefox 现在支持非标准 ::-webkit-scrollbar 伪元素的有限子集，以提高 Web 兼容性：

blocks.html_en: • Rules with non-zero width/height disable overlay scrollbars for the affected container.

sentences.en: Rules with non-zero width/height disable overlay scrollbars for the affected container.
sentences.zh: 具有非零宽度/高度的规则会禁用受影响容器的覆盖滚动条。

blocks.html_en: • display: none on ::-webkit-scrollbar behaves like scrollbar-width: none, hiding the scrollbar.

sentences.en: display: none on ::-webkit-scrollbar behaves like scrollbar-width: none, hiding the scrollbar.
sentences.zh: ::-webkit-scrollbar 上的 display: none 的行为类似于scrollbar-width: none，隐藏滚动条。

blocks.html_en: • @supports selector(::-webkit-scrollbar) now evaluates to true.

sentences.en: @supports selector(::-webkit-scrollbar) now evaluates to true.
sentences.zh: @supports 选择器(::-webkit-scrollbar) 现在评估为 true。

blocks.html_en: • Full styling capabilities (colors, border-radius, etc.) are intentionally not supported.

sentences.en: Full styling capabilities (colors, border-radius, etc.) are intentionally not supported.
sentences.zh: 故意不支持完整的样式功能（颜色、边框半径等）。

blocks.html_en: • Updated HTML parsing rules for <select> elements, aligning with web standards to support future customizable select dropdown features.

sentences.en: Updated HTML parsing rules for <select> elements, aligning with web standards to support future customizable select dropdown features.
sentences.zh: 更新了 <select> 元素的 HTML 解析规则，与 Web 标准保持一致，以支持未来可定制的选择下拉功能。

blocks.html_en: Updated HTML parsing rules for <select> elements, aligning with web standards to support future customizable select dropdown features.

sentences.en: Updated HTML parsing rules for <select> elements, aligning with web standards to support future customizable select dropdown features.
sentences.zh: 更新了 <select> 元素的 HTML 解析规则，与 Web 标准保持一致，以支持未来可定制的选择下拉功能。

blocks.html_en: • The vertical-align property was converted into a shorthand for baseline-source, alignment-baseline, and baseline-shift in Firefox 149. Now, alignment-baseline supports the new keywords alphabetic, ideographic, central, mathematical, and hanging, extending the variety of baselines to choose for alignment.

sentences.en: The vertical-align property was converted into a shorthand for baseline-source, alignment-baseline, and baseline-shift in Firefox 149.
sentences.zh: 在 Firefox 149 中，vertical-align 属性被转换为基线源、对齐基线和基线移位的简写。

sentences.en: Now, alignment-baseline supports the new keywords alphabetic, ideographic, central, mathematical, and hanging, extending the variety of baselines to choose for alignment.
sentences.zh: 现在，alignment-baseline 支持新的关键字字母、表意、中心、数学和悬挂，扩展了选择对齐的基线的种类。

blocks.html_en: The vertical-align property was converted into a shorthand for baseline-source, alignment-baseline, and baseline-shift in Firefox 149. Now, alignment-baseline supports the new keywords alphabetic, ideographic, central, mathematical, and hanging, extending the variety of baselines to choose for alignment.

sentences.en: The vertical-align property was converted into a shorthand for baseline-source, alignment-baseline, and baseline-shift in Firefox 149.
sentences.zh: 在 Firefox 149 中，vertical-align 属性被转换为基线源、对齐基线和基线移位的简写。

sentences.en: Now, alignment-baseline supports the new keywords alphabetic, ideographic, central, mathematical, and hanging, extending the variety of baselines to choose for alignment.
sentences.zh: 现在，alignment-baseline 支持新的关键字字母、表意、中心、数学和悬挂，扩展了选择对齐的基线的种类。

blocks.html_en: • Implemented the new popover=hint spec, which removes a series of inconsistent and unexpected behaviors.

sentences.en: Implemented the new popover=hint spec, which removes a series of inconsistent and unexpected behaviors.
sentences.zh: 实现了新的 popover=hint 规范，它消除了一系列不一致和意外的行为。

blocks.html_en: Implemented the new popover=hint spec, which removes a series of inconsistent and unexpected behaviors.

sentences.en: Implemented the new popover=hint spec, which removes a series of inconsistent and unexpected behaviors.
sentences.zh: 实现了新的 popover=hint 规范，它消除了一系列不一致和意外的行为。

blocks.html_en: • The circle() and ellipse() functions accept two new keywords closest-corner and farthest-corner for their radial size.

sentences.en: The circle() and ellipse() functions accept two new keywords closest-corner and farthest-corner for their radial size.
sentences.zh: Circle() 和 ellipse() 函数接受两个新关键字closest-corner 和farthest-corner 来表示其径向尺寸。

blocks.html_en: The circle() and ellipse() functions accept two new keywords closest-corner and farthest-corner for their radial size.

sentences.en: The circle() and ellipse() functions accept two new keywords closest-corner and farthest-corner for their radial size.
sentences.zh: Circle() 和 ellipse() 函数接受两个新关键字closest-corner 和farthest-corner 来表示其径向尺寸。

blocks.html_en: • The newly added Error.stackTraceLimit property allows to set the maximal depth of the captured JavaScript error stack as a performance optimization.

sentences.en: The newly added Error.stackTraceLimit property allows to set the maximal depth of the captured JavaScript error stack as a performance optimization.
sentences.zh: 新添加的 Error.stackTraceLimit 属性允许设置捕获的 JavaScript 错误堆栈的最大深度作为性能优化。

blocks.html_en: The newly added Error.stackTraceLimit property allows to set the maximal depth of the captured JavaScript error stack as a performance optimization.

sentences.en: The newly added Error.stackTraceLimit property allows to set the maximal depth of the captured JavaScript error stack as a performance optimization.
sentences.zh: 新添加的 Error.stackTraceLimit 属性允许设置捕获的 JavaScript 错误堆栈的最大深度作为性能优化。

blocks.html_en: • Developers can now use the text import attribute to import text files using the module system.

sentences.en: Developers can now use the text import attribute to import text files using the module system.
sentences.zh: 开发人员现在可以使用文本导入属性通过模块系统导入文本文件。

blocks.html_en: Developers can now use the text import attribute to import text files using the module system.

sentences.en: Developers can now use the text import attribute to import text files using the module system.
sentences.zh: 开发人员现在可以使用文本导入属性通过模块系统导入文本文件。

blocks.html_en: • The Picture In Picture API exposes a way for web developers to make use of user agent Picture-In-Picture functionality.

sentences.en: The Picture In Picture API exposes a way for web developers to make use of user agent Picture-In-Picture functionality.
sentences.zh: 画中画 API 为 Web 开发人员提供了一种利用用户代理画中画功能的方法。

blocks.html_en: The Picture In Picture API exposes a way for web developers to make use of user agent Picture-In-Picture functionality.

sentences.en: The Picture In Picture API exposes a way for web developers to make use of user agent Picture-In-Picture functionality.
sentences.zh: 画中画 API 为 Web 开发人员提供了一种利用用户代理画中画功能的方法。

blocks.html_en: • The Intl.LocaleInfo proposal adds the ability to query Locale information, such as week data (first day in a week, weekend start day, weekend end day), text direction and hour cycle used in the Locale.

sentences.en: The Intl.LocaleInfo proposal adds the ability to query Locale information, such as week data (first day in a week, weekend start day, weekend end day), text direction and hour cycle used in the Locale.
sentences.zh: Intl.LocaleInfo提案增加了查询Locale信息的功能，例如周数据（一周的第一天、周末开始日、周末结束日）、Locale中使用的文本方向和小时周期。

blocks.html_en: The Intl.LocaleInfo proposal adds the ability to query Locale information, such as week data (first day in a week, weekend start day, weekend end day), text direction and hour cycle used in the Locale.

sentences.en: The Intl.LocaleInfo proposal adds the ability to query Locale information, such as week data (first day in a week, weekend start day, weekend end day), text direction and hour cycle used in the Locale.
sentences.zh: Intl.LocaleInfo提案增加了查询Locale信息的功能，例如周数据（一周的第一天、周末开始日、周末结束日）、Locale中使用的文本方向和小时周期。

blocks.html_en: • The MediaCapabilities.decodingInfo() and MediaCapabilities.encodingInfo() methods now accept the "webrtc" configuration type. This allows a site to query whether a given audio or video configuration can be decoded or encoded for WebRTC and whether doing so will be smooth and/or powerEfficient.

sentences.en: The MediaCapabilities.decodingInfo() and MediaCapabilities.encodingInfo() methods now accept the "webrtc" configuration type.
sentences.zh: MediaCapability.decodingInfo() 和 MediaCapativity.encodingInfo() 方法现在接受“webrtc”配置类型。

sentences.en: This allows a site to query whether a given audio or video configuration can be decoded or encoded for WebRTC and whether doing so will be smooth and/or powerEfficient.
sentences.zh: 这允许站点查询给定的音频或视频配置是否可以针对 WebRTC 进行解码或编码，以及这样做是否流畅和/或节能。

blocks.html_en: The MediaCapabilities.decodingInfo() and MediaCapabilities.encodingInfo() methods now accept the "webrtc" configuration type. This allows a site to query whether a given audio or video configuration can be decoded or encoded for WebRTC and whether doing so will be smooth and/or powerEfficient.

sentences.en: The MediaCapabilities.decodingInfo() and MediaCapabilities.encodingInfo() methods now accept the "webrtc" configuration type.
sentences.zh: MediaCapability.decodingInfo() 和 MediaCapativity.encodingInfo() 方法现在接受“webrtc”配置类型。

sentences.en: This allows a site to query whether a given audio or video configuration can be decoded or encoded for WebRTC and whether doing so will be smooth and/or powerEfficient.
sentences.zh: 这允许站点查询给定的音频或视频配置是否可以针对 WebRTC 进行解码或编码，以及这样做是否流畅和/或节能。

content_html_zh:
版本153.0beta，于2026年6月17日首次向Beta通道用户提供

Firefox Beta 每周更新 3 次，因此 Beta 通道的发行说明会不断更新，以反映已经足够成熟的功能，可以从社区反馈和错误报告中受益。

警告：此处列出的功能可能会也可能不会成为 Firefox 的最终版本。

除了这些发行说明之外，您还可以通过 Firefox Trains 网站或我们的 @FirefoxBeta Bluesky 帐户关注正在进行的开发。

  • 高动态范围 (HDR) 视频播放现在可在 Windows 上使用 - 此功能需要在 Windows 设置 - 显示中为显示器启用 HDR 模式。 目前不支持仅提供“HDR 视频流”的笔记本电脑显示器。 手机上以某些方向录制的某些视频目前无法显示为 HDR。
  • 容器可让您将在线生活的各个部分（工作、购物、个人、银行业务）登录到同一浏览器窗口中的不同帐户，但将 cookie 和广告跟踪隔离在每个容器内。
  • 现在可以通过将 PDF 拖到 PDF 侧边栏来合并多个 PDF。
  • 现在可以使用 Firefox PDF 编辑器将图像添加为 PDF 中的新页面。
  • 通过在地址栏中键入“选择颜色”、“颜色选择器”或“滴管”并选择“选择颜色”快速操作，可以从任何页面快速选择和复制颜色。
  • 添加了对 Apple 系统范围的全屏键盘命令 (Globe-F) 的支持。
  • 使用二维码共享任何打开的页面。 右键单击选项卡，选择共享 > 生成二维码。 非常适合海报、邀请函、横幅和其他印刷材料。 在 macOS 上，您还可以右键单击地址栏来访问“共享”菜单。
  • Firefox 现在根据 eIDAS 法规验证并显示合格网站身份验证证书 (QWAC)。
  • 添加了对带有叠加层的视频的改进支持，以便用户可以更轻松地从上下文菜单访问视频操作。
  • 现在，只要网站有权访问您的位置，Firefox 就会以红色突出显示位置权限图标。 权限图标现在在以前隐藏的搜索结果页面上也可见。
  • 现在可以通过在地址栏中输入“labs”或“experiment”并选择“打开 Firefox Labs”快速操作来快速打开 Firefox Labs。
  • Firefox 现在为新的 JPEG XL 图像格式提供实验性支持，该格式通常提供比 WebP、JPEG、PNG 和 GIF 更好的压缩，并且旨在取代它们。 您可以从“设置”中的 Firefox Labs 面板启用它。
  • 默认情况下，扩展程序无法再访问本地文件。 用户可以通过新的“访问计算机上的本地文件”权限授予或撤销此访问权限，该权限与“访问所有网站的数据”分开。
  • 现在默认为所有用户启用本地网络访问限制。 Firefox 要求网站在连接到本地网络上的设备或设备上的应用程序和服务之前请求许可。
  • 过时的 cookie 设置已从设置 UI 中删除。 仍处于该模式的用户应切换到默认行为“隔离跨站点 cookie”。 更多信息
  • 选项面板中的新“本地模式”设置允许开发人员通过自定义来源加载本地目录。 这简化了对无法通过标准 file:// URL 运行的 API 的测试，无需运行本地 Web 服务器。 支持多个目录映射。
  • Firefox 现在支持非标准 ::-webkit-scrollbar 伪元素的有限子集，以提高 Web 兼容性：具有非零宽度/高度的规则会禁用受影响容器的覆盖滚动条。 ::-webkit-scrollbar 上的 display: none 的行为类似于scrollbar-width: none，隐藏滚动条。 @supports 选择器(::-webkit-scrollbar) 现在评估为 true。 故意不支持完整的样式功能（颜色、边框半径等）。
  • 更新了 <select> 元素的 HTML 解析规则，与 Web 标准保持一致，以支持未来可定制的选择下拉功能。
  • 在 Firefox 149 中，vertical-align 属性被转换为基线源、对齐基线和基线移位的简写。 现在，alignment-baseline 支持新的关键字字母、表意、中心、数学和悬挂，扩展了选择对齐的基线的种类。
  • 实现了新的 popover=hint 规范，它消除了一系列不一致和意外的行为。
  • Circle() 和 ellipse() 函数接受两个新关键字closest-corner 和farthest-corner 来表示其径向尺寸。
  • 新添加的 Error.stackTraceLimit 属性允许设置捕获的 JavaScript 错误堆栈的最大深度作为性能优化。
  • 开发人员现在可以使用文本导入属性通过模块系统导入文本文件。
  • 画中画 API 为 Web 开发人员提供了一种利用用户代理画中画功能的方法。
  • Intl.LocaleInfo提案增加了查询Locale信息的功能，例如周数据（一周的第一天、周末开始日、周末结束日）、Locale中使用的文本方向和小时周期。
  • MediaCapability.decodingInfo() 和 MediaCapativity.encodingInfo() 方法现在接受“webrtc”配置类型。 这允许站点查询给定的音频或视频配置是否可以针对 WebRTC 进行解码或编码，以及这样做是否流畅和/或节能。
